title: [n8n] Daily YouTube Trends to Newsletter Auto-Publishing
description: Build an n8n automation that fetches trending YouTube videos in your niche daily, summarizes them with Claude, and publishes a newsletter to Substack or Notion.

steps.title: Fetch YouTube trending videos via RSS
steps.instruction: Set up a daily schedule trigger that fetches the latest videos from your target YouTube channels.
steps.prompt: How do I set up n8n to fetch YouTube channel RSS feeds daily and extract the latest 5 video titles, descriptions, and URLs?
steps.expected_result: n8n workflow that retrieves the 5 most recent videos from your configured channels each day
steps.tip: Use multiple HTTP Request nodes with different channel IDs to monitor multiple channels at once

steps.title: Summarize videos with Claude
steps.instruction: For each video, fetch the transcript and generate a newsletter-style summary with Claude.
steps.prompt: You are a newsletter writer for an AI/tech audience. Read this YouTube video transcript and write a 3-sentence newsletter summary that: captures the key insight, explains why it matters, and ends with 'Watch here: [URL]'. Keep it engaging and specific.
steps.expected_result: A newsletter-ready summary for each video, with the key insight and a link
steps.tip: Use claude-haiku-4-5 to keep daily costs under $0.10

steps.title: Format and publish the newsletter
steps.instruction: Combine all summaries into a formatted newsletter and publish it.
steps.prompt: Combine these video summaries into a daily newsletter. Format: Header with today's date and 'Today's Top AI Videos', then each summary as a numbered section. End with a one-line closing remark.
steps.expected_result: A formatted daily newsletter with multiple video summaries
steps.tip: For Substack: use their API or email integration. For Notion: use the Notion node in n8n.

challenge: Add a quality filter step: before publishing, run each summary through Claude and ask it to rate the video's quality (1-5). Only include videos rated 4 or higher in the newsletter.

videos.title: n8n YouTube Newsletter Automation Tutorial
videos.search_keyword: n8n YouTube newsletter automation content pipeline 2026

practicePrompts.label: Fetch YouTube Trends
practicePrompts.instruction: Retrieve the latest trending YouTube videos in your niche.
practicePrompts.prompt: Fetch the top trending YouTube videos in the cooking niche for today.
practicePrompts.followUp: Try changing the niche to technology and see what trends appear.

practicePrompts.label: Summarize Videos with Claude
practicePrompts.instruction: Summarize the fetched YouTube videos using Claude.
practicePrompts.prompt: Summarize the following YouTube videos: [list of video titles].
practicePrompts.followUp: Experiment with different summarization styles, like bullet points or paragraphs.

practicePrompts.label: Publish to Substack
practicePrompts.instruction: Create a newsletter draft from the summaries and prepare it for Substack.
practicePrompts.prompt: Draft a newsletter for Substack using the following summaries: [insert summaries].
practicePrompts.followUp: Modify the draft to include a personal introduction or conclusion.
